defect_1_missing_file_unreachable.how: expected admitted-name set built from remote manifest before local inspection; every expected name required present; missing name reported, never dropped

defect_2_self_referential_checksums.how: expected checksums bound from remote immutable metadata (lfs/blob sha256) and reconciled against locally computed sha256; missing immutable identity fails closed

defect_3_storage_resume_absent_from_conj.how: free-space/expected-bytes/temp-overhead/safety-margin/partial-cleanup/deterministic-resume/final-reconciliation/cache-isolation conjunction; gpu ceilings excluded as non-storage evidence

defect_6_tests_not_exercising_orchestrat.how: run_staging_orchestration composes remote-manifest->download->discover->presence->checksum->storage; integration tests force missing/partial/extra/cache/wrong-checksum/insufficient-space/cleanup/resume/mutable-revision/path-escape through that same path

defect_5_complete_tokenizer_conjunction.how: complete_tokenizer_admission now binds every observed value to an independently derived expected value by EQUALITY (not non-null/hex-shape): exact cleanup equality (defect 1); BOS/EOS/PAD bound to expected identities (defect 2); strict positive int rejecting booleans for encoded length (defect 3); manifest/chat-render/id-sequence digest equality vs independent recomputation, not shape (defect 4). Expected special-token identities and expected cleanup are required inputs (raise if absent).
defect_5_complete_tokenizer_conjunction.remaining: defect-5 point-5 live production composition: the live orchestration must DERIVE the expected values independently (immutable tokenizer manifest digest, fresh chat-template rendering digest, fresh private-fixture encoding digest, expected special-token ids from pinned files) and feed both observed+expected here.

defect_4_source_and_load_manifest_admiss.how: validate_source_identity now binds observed source identity to an independently derived EXPECTED identity by equality (outer/text-only class, exact module qualname, immutable source hash) rather than shape-only; validate_load_manifest requires the admitted module set to EQUAL a frozen positive allow-list exactly (no missing, no unapproved extra), verifies per-layer projection + shared/routed-expert coverage via exact dot-delimited segment admission (decoys fail, unpacked+packed layouts), makes parameter shapes MANDATORY, and keeps vision/MTP as deny-list defense in depth. 20 tests incl. valid-shape-wrong-hash, wrong-qualname, omitted-shapes, decoy-substring, one-layer-missing-expert, unapproved-alias, and vision/MTP-even-if-allowlisted failures.
defect_4_source_and_load_manifest_admiss.remaining: the complete expected allow-list, expected source identity, and parameter shapes must be DERIVED by the live orchestration from the pinned implementation source + model.safetensors.index.json weight map (the open live-composition step).

remaining_blockers.live_production_composition: a live CLI entrypoint must independently DERIVE all expected values (remote LFS identities; model.safetensors.index.json weight-map -> admitted module set + param shapes + expert layout; pinned implementation-source class mapping + qualname + source hash; tokenizer manifest/chat-render/id-sequence digests + special-token ids) and compose run_staging_orchestration + validate_source_identity + validate_load_manifest + complete_tokenizer_admission into ONE final Phase-0 conjunction, with orchestration-level integration tests through that same path
remaining_blockers.weight_staging: not attempted; not authorized before a genuine Phase-0 pass

privacy: aggregate-only; no raw fixture text, token IDs, weights, caches, local paths, or private digests
